value.0: Spectres are incorporeal undead often mistaken for Ghosts. They haunt the places where they died, retaining their sentience but now hating all living things.
Wraiths are incorporeal creatures born of evil and darkness. They despise all living things, as well as the light that nurtures them.
Various gears control the locking mechanism of this metal-clad door.

···=  ··== ·===Server Rules===· ==··  =···
These rules must be sctrictly and specifically followed, there is no loop hole to trick the rules. Please abide to the rules as much as you can.

1) Never use Cheats or do Cheats of any kind, that INCLUDES item duplicating of any kind and even the lesser kind of cheating. DMs and Mods will be keeping an eye on the Server. We Know them all. If you know any, don't Abuse them. .2da editing is not allowed, YOU WILL BE CAUGHT.Report them and you'll be rewarded accordingly.

2) No swearing in shout, incase you don't know what it means, swearing is cursing, bad words, insults, anything stupid. Use shout frequently and for GOOD purposes.

3) If you loose items, please talk to a DM about it. Remember you won't always get the items you lost back. So unless your reason is REASONABLE then you will be helped. No not complaining!

4) No using blank names, or names containing non-keyboard  characters, or names that are really long and really annoying.

5) No begging the DMs for anything. Ever. This includes items, levels, gold, alignment changes, etc.

6) Pick Pocketing, Disarming, and Ninja Looting are all allowed. But you will simply be disputed and disliked.

7) Leading NPCs to other areas by running from them or Domination are not acceptable actions here. Please do not do this, Running for your life is one this leading a NPC to other areas is another. If a creature chases you to another area, please report it to a DM immediatly.

8) The DMs are not here to babysit you, so don't bug them unless it's important. 

9) Do not disrespect DMs or other Players, the DM is always right.
 
 

··Homer's LOTR Staff··  
       HomelessSon  
       (TBD/placeholder)

· ··  ···Tournamnet System··· ·· ·

We now have alot of active tournament Dungeon Masters and Tournaments will be held when we get enough players :)
Upon winning a tournamnet the player will be rewarded Tournamnet Tokens. With 10 of these tokens you can then buy a tournament item from a Dungeon Master. Tournament gear are special items and should be treated as such.

HomelessSon
Strange runes and pictographs, likely arcane in nature, have been scorched into the sides of this hide-covered strongbox.
Pull rope to spawn gladiator arena doors in the Well of Eru.
A black obelisk humming with a music you almost recognise. Touch it to enter the Hall of Legends.

Prized by pack rats far and wide, Bags of Holding originated among the mischievous kender in the far-off world of Krynn. According to popular folklore, one enterprising kender actually founded a utopian village inside his Bag of Holding. It apparently continues to thrive to this very day.
